title: Byakuya
description: Byakuya is a messaging app created using Nextjs and integrated with Elysiajs and websocket.
longDescription: Byakuya is a real-time messaging application built with modern web technologies. It uses Next.js for the frontend, Elysia.js for the backend API, and WebSocket for real-time bidirectional communication. The app features instant messaging, user presence indicators, and a clean responsive interface.

title: Naya Living
description: Founded in 2020, Naya Living is a Jakarta-based design studio with a team of passionate interior designers, architects, and builders.
longDescription: Founded in 2020, Naya Living is a Jakarta-based design studio with a team of passionate interior designers, architects, and builders. We specialize in crafting modern, sustainable spaces tailored to your lifestyle. From concept to construction, we bring your vision to life with precision and creativity, ensuring every space reflects your unique values and needs.

title: BTN Properti
description: BTNProperti.co.id is a web portal for searching various categories of properties with the most comprehensive options from various regions in Indonesia.
longDescription: BTNProperti.co.id is a web portal for searching various categories of properties with the most comprehensive options from various regions in Indonesia. Integrated with BTN Bank's mortgage facility, it becomes easier to obtain your dream property.

title: Hoshi
description: Hoshi stands as a pioneering streaming platform meticulously crafted to cater to the insatiable appetite of anime enthusiasts worldwide.
longDescription: Hoshi stands as a pioneering streaming platform meticulously crafted to cater to the insatiable appetite of anime enthusiasts worldwide. With a meticulously curated library boasting an extensive array of anime series and movies, all accompanied by accurate English subtitles.

title: IISF Website
description: Indonesia Sustainability Forum (ISF) is established as a platform to foster collaborations and best practice sharing across stakeholders in decarbonization actions.
longDescription: Indonesia Sustainability Forum (ISF) is established as a platform to foster collaborations and best practice sharing across stakeholders in decarbonization actions, ultimately advancing the global concerted effort in pursuing a sustainable growth.

title: Lagalio
description: Create the Spotify playlist they want with a song that the user chooses. Lagalio uses the API from Spotify to create the playlist.
longDescription: Create the Spotify playlist they want with a song that the user chooses. Lagalio uses the API from Spotify to create the playlist.

title: SI-MIKU
description: A monitoring dashboard that can be used by FILKOM UB Management to observe student progress.
longDescription: A monitoring dashboard that can be used by FILKOM UB Management to observe student progress. Built with a modern full-stack architecture featuring React on the frontend and Express/Node.js on the backend with MySQL database.

title: Pokedex
description: A Pokedex application built with React and TypeScript, featuring a clean UI with TailwindCSS.
longDescription: A Pokedex application built with React and TypeScript that lets you browse and search for Pokémon. Features a responsive design, search functionality, and detailed Pokémon information pages.

title: Personal Website v1
description: A personal website created using Next.js and MDX.
longDescription: The first version of my personal portfolio website, built with Next.js and MDX for content management. Features blog posts, project showcases, and a clean, responsive design.
